markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, review process, and Phase 1 performance.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** 10 articles are in review, with 2 ready for publication. The review process will be simplified to unblock the target of 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [**Phase 1 Performance:** Early results are strong, with 2 published articles ranking on page 1 (avg. pos. 6.5) and page 2 (avg. pos. 13), validating the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Competitor Content:** GrowthX proposed a competitor content cluster to control the narrative in LLMs, citing a case where a competitor's article negatively influenced AI results.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Renewal Decision:** GrowthX will deliver a Phase 1 summary today to inform Fieldguide's renewal decision, due by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Review Process

  - [**Status:** 12 articles are in the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [**Ready for Publication:** 2 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [**In Review:** 10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Process Bottleneck:** The current two-step review (Amanda → Solution Engineers) is causing delays, preventing the team from hitting the 5-article/week publication target.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**Solution:** Simplify the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [**Future Workflow:** Amanda reviews → GrowthX publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [**Enablement:** GrowthX will provide Fieldguide with HubSpot access.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### Phase 1 Performance & Renewal

  - [**Context:** This is Week 7 of Phase 1, prompting a summary document for the renewal decision.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Early Results:** The first 2 published articles show strong initial performance.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Avg. Position:** 6.5 (page 1) and 13 (page 2).](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Significance:** This validates the strategy, as Google quickly indexed and ranked the content, demonstrating quality.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Renewal Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Deliver Phase 1 summary document today.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [**Fieldguide:** Provide renewal decision by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

### Competitor Content Strategy

  - [**Proposal:** Create a competitor content cluster to control the narrative in LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Competitors may publish negative content that LLMs then cite, as seen in a GrowthX client case.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [**Example:** A competitor's article claimed a client wasn't an "enterprise solution." This was cited by LLMs, forcing a reactive content strategy to counter the narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Benefit:** Proactively publishing accurate, product-focused comparisons ensures LLMs have the correct information about Fieldguide's features and capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Deliver Phase 1 summary document (today).](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [Provide competitor content examples to Yasine.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Update Looker dashboard after 2 articles are published.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [Confirm analytics report update with Sunil.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Yasine:**](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [Expedite feedback from Mark on article images.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [Present renewal recommendation to Mark.](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [Provide renewal decision to GrowthX (by early next week).](https://fathom.video/share/uu87PLWZrLRT9AcXuBzUikfgszQjAs98?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
